trust.docs.title: Certified Documents

checkout.title: Confirm purchasing details.

checkout.notice: After you submit this request, a GYUTRON representative will contact you to confirm stock, lead time, shipping, and payment before any charge is made.

account.title: Create a purchasing account.

quote.copy: Use this for volume purchases, uncertain model selection, compliance documents, accessories, and shipping review.

form.name: Name
about.seo.title: About Us | GYUTRON Official Store
about.title: Official purchasing entrance for GYUTRON industrial hardware.
about.c1.title: Industrial Focus
about.c1.body: GYUTRON focuses on rugged data capture, sensing, machine vision, inspection, and connected automation hardware.
about.c2.title: B2B Procurement
about.c2.body: The store supports samples, accessories, small-batch purchases, quote requests, and engineering confirmation before order release.
about.c3.title: Brand Website
about.c3.body: For company, solution, and technical capability information, visit www.gyutron.com.
pm.seo.title: Payment Methods | GYUTRON Official Store
pm.title: Designed for online payment and B2B procurement terms.
pm.c1.title: Credit Card
pm.c2.title: PayPal
pm.c2.body: Useful for samples, small accessories, and international buyers.
pm.c3.title: Wire Transfer
pm.c3.body: Suitable for B2B orders and proforma invoice workflows.
pm.c4.title: Quote First
pm.c4.body: Used when shipping, lead time, or configuration must be confirmed before payment.
ship.seo.title: Shipping Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
ship.title: Shipping is confirmed by product and destination.
ship.c1.title: Courier And Freight
ship.c1.body: Small products may ship by courier. Larger or configured industrial orders may require freight review.
ship.c2.title: Lead Time
ship.c2.body: Stock and production lead time are confirmed before payment capture or proforma invoice release.
ship.c3.title: Duties And Taxes
ship.c3.body: Import duties, taxes, and customs requirements are the buyer's responsibility unless otherwise agreed.
rr.seo.title: Return & Refund Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
rr.title: Returns are reviewed against industrial order conditions.
rr.c1.title: Eligibility
rr.c1.body: Standard unopened items may be reviewed for return. Customized, configured, or used industrial products may be excluded.
rr.c2.title: RMA Review
rr.c2.body: Contact support before returning any item. Unauthorized returns may be rejected.
rr.c3.title: Refund Timing
rr.c3.body: Approved refunds are processed after inspection and according to the original payment method or invoice terms.
tos.seo.title: Terms of Service | GYUTRON Official Store
tos.title: Industrial purchases may require review before fulfillment.
tos.c1.title: Order Acceptance
tos.c1.body: Orders may require stock, export, configuration, or certification review before acceptance.
tos.c2.title: Product Information
tos.c2.body: Specifications, prices, and lead times can change before final confirmation or proforma invoice.
tos.c3.title: Business Use
tos.c3.body: The store is intended for industrial and B2B procurement, not unrelated consumer purchases.
war.seo.title: Warranty Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
war.title: Warranty coverage is confirmed by product line.
war.c1.title: Coverage
war.c1.body: Standard warranty terms depend on product type, configuration, and purchase agreement.
war.c2.title: Exclusions
war.c2.body: Misuse, unauthorized repair, improper installation, and environmental damage may be excluded.
war.c3.title: Service Process
war.c3.body: Contact support with order details, serial number, fault description, and application environment.
priv.seo.title: Privacy Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
priv.title: We use purchasing data to support B2B orders and inquiries.
priv.c1.title: Information Collected
priv.c1.body: Contact, company, shipping, inquiry, and order details may be collected when you submit forms or checkout requests.
priv.c2.title: Use Of Data
priv.c2.body: Data is used for quotes, order review, support, shipment coordination, and procurement communication.
priv.c3.title: Third Parties
priv.c3.body: Payment, shipping, CRM, and ecommerce providers may process data after platform integration.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add sample items or accessories from the official store.

seo.automated-vision-inspection.title: GYUTRON Automated Vision Inspection | Industrial Quality Solutions
seo.automated-vision-inspection.desc: GYUTRON automated vision inspection solutions combine smart cameras, sensors, lighting, barcode verification, edge control, and traceability for modern manufacturing quality teams.
main.270: GYUTRON combines smart cameras, white-light vision lighting, industrial sensors, barcode verification, edge control, and quality data workflows into inspection systems that help factories find defects earlier and protect downstream processes.
main.272: Built for inline inspection, assembly verification, traceability, and repeatable quality evidence across production lines.
main.278: From visual checks to traceable quality decisions.
main.279: Inspired by advanced industrial inspection ecosystems, this solution positions GYUTRON as more than a hardware supplier: cameras, sensing, code reading, lighting, controllers, and quality records are planned as one operational system.
main.280: Detect missing parts, wrong orientation, assembly errors, surface issues, height variance, and visible defects at production speed.
main.281: Read barcodes and DPM codes, validate labels, connect scan records to lots, and keep inspection evidence tied to each unit.
main.282: Use calibrated imaging, laser measurement, and inspection instruments for repeatable tolerance checks and appearance review.
main.283: Combine robot movement, fixed vision, and guided inspection points for final assembly, packaging, and multi-side product review.
main.285: Inspection hardware connected to factory decisions.
main.286: The architecture links image acquisition, sensor triggers, lighting control, edge analysis, PLC handshakes, and quality data capture so inspection results can stop defects before they travel downstream.
main.287: GYUTRON smart camera and inspection cell visual
main.289: Smart cameras, code readers, sensors, and stable white-light illumination capture reliable data at the inspection point.
main.291: Edge controllers and vision tools evaluate presence, position, dimensions, code quality, and surface conditions.
main.293: PLC signals, I/O modules, and robot or conveyor logic can reject, stop, route, or release units based on inspection outcomes.
main.295: Images, results, device events, and scan IDs can be structured for MES, WMS, dashboards, or customer quality reports.
main.297: A practical path from pilot station to repeatable line deployment.
main.298: GYUTRON solution work should start from the production problem, then map device choice, inspection logic, data interfaces, and operational handoff in a controlled sequence.
main.300: Clarify defect types, line speed, sample parts, reject logic, traceability records, and pass/fail ownership.
main.301: Select cameras, lighting, sensors, scanners, edge controllers, mounting, and interfaces around the physical station.
main.303: Run pilot checks, tune thresholds, document repeatability, and prepare the same architecture for adjacent stations.
main.304: Plan an inspection station with GYUTRON.
main.305: Share your part, defect examples, required throughput, lighting constraints, PLC/MES needs, and traceability goals. The GYUTRON team can recommend the right inspection stack and pilot route.
seo.contact-sales.title: Contact GYUTRON Sales | Industrial Automation Inquiry
seo.contact-sales.desc: Contact GYUTRON sales for industrial intelligent hardware, machine vision, rugged PDA terminals, sensors, inspection instruments, and automation deployment support.
seo.contact-sales.ogdesc: Share your industrial automation requirement and GYUTRON will help map the right hardware stack and deployment plan.
main.308: Talk with GYUTRON about your industrial automation project.
main.309: Share your product interest, site requirements, deployment timeline, and integration needs. Our team will help map the right hardware stack for production, inspection, logistics, or field operations.
main.313: Use the form for project details, or contact us directly for product specification, pilot planning, OEM / ODM programs, and channel cooperation.
main.314: For faster review, include your product category, target application, expected quantity, country / region, and any interface or certification requirements.
main.317: Submit your request directly to GYUTRON. A sales specialist will review your requirement and follow up by email or WhatsApp.
main.321: Application, current process, required functions, timeline, quantity, integration interface, or certification needs.
main.323: Your inquiry is submitted through the GYUTRON website backend. If the form is unavailable, email info@gyutron.com or use WhatsApp.
main.325: Define product type, inspection target, data capture flow, environment, and integration constraints.
main.327: Match rugged PDA terminals, sensors, smart cameras, inspection instruments, robot cells, and edge controllers.
main.330: Support sample review, pilot configuration, accessory selection, documentation, and partner delivery planning.
